speaker_details.speaker: Speaker 1
speaker_details.text: All right, we'll let Ben in now...

speaker_details.speaker: Speaker 3
speaker_details.text: I've been an electrician for 30 years, running my own business for the last eight...

speaker_details.speaker: Speaker 3
speaker_details.text: I've got a software called Jobber that runs on my CRM...

speaker_details.speaker: Speaker 1
speaker_details.text: The most basic plan that we have is $249 a month... covers 500 minutes.
